title: Genuine Fred Bottle Neck Guitar Bottle Brush Long-Handle Sponge, Fun and Unique Acoustic Guitar Design, Gift-Ready Packaging, Great for Music Lovers
features: FUN AND FUNCTIONAL: Now here's a riff on your classic bottle sponge. Fred’s Bottle Neck bottle brush, shaped like an acoustic guitar, is a fun and functional cleaning tool that hits all the right notes.
GOOD FOR NARROW SPACES: Designed to clean bottles, tumblers, and other tight spots, this brush makes tackling hard-to-reach areas a breeze.

UNIQUE, DURABLE DESIGN: Fred’s Bottle Neck is a durable and reliable tool that is tough on dirt but gentle on your favorite drinkware. Measures approximately 2.8" x 1.2" x 8.1". Includes corded loop for drying (and display!)
CLEVER AND PLAYFUL: Whether you're doing a quick "tune-up" or gearing up for a full cleaning gig, this fun guitar-shaped sponge is perfectly tuned for the job.
GIFT READY PACKAGING: Packed on an illustrative fun backer card, this quirky bottle brush makes a great gift for music lovers and cleaning enthusiasts alike.
description: Whether you’re giving your tumblers a light tune-up or gearing up for an all-out cleaning gig, Fred’s Bottle Neck hits all the right notes. Modeled after an acoustic guitar, this sponge is perfectly tuned to clean narrow spaces, making those tough-to-reach spots a breeze to hit. Packed on an illustrative, peggable backer card. Design by Fred Studio.
